targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) as time, count() as requests FROM proxy_logs.request_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) as time, countIf(response_status_code >= 400) as errors FROM proxy_logs.request_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) as time, quantile(0.50)(response_duration_ms) as p50 FROM proxy_logs.request_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND response_duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) as time, quantile(0.95)(response_duration_ms) as p95 FROM proxy_logs.request_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND response_duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) as time, quantile(0.99)(response_duration_ms) as p99 FROM proxy_logs.request_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND response_duration_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT response_status_code as status, count() as count FROM proxy_logs.request_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND response_status_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY status

SELECT origin_id, count() as requests, avg(response_duration_ms) as avg_duration_ms, countIf(response_status_code >= 400) as errors FROM proxy_logs.request_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY origin_id ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT timestamp, request_method, request_path, response_status_code, response_duration_ms, origin_id, request_remote_addr FROM proxy_logs.request_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
